items.title: S01E01 - The Big Con
items.summary: The team's first mission is to substitute counterfeit printing plates for the real ones, which are being transported across Germany in a tank.

infolabels.title: The Big Con
infolabels.plot: The team's first mission is to substitute counterfeit printing plates for the real ones, which are being transported across Germany in a tank.

items.title: S01E02 - Breakout
items.summary: The team kidnaps a German colonel's son in order to trade him for a captured resistance leader.

infolabels.title: Breakout
infolabels.plot: The team kidnaps a German colonel's son in order to trade him for a captured resistance leader.

items.title: S01E03 - The Grab
items.summary: In order to rescue the infant son of a defecting German scientist, the team is forced to kidnap three infants and transport them cross-country.

infolabels.title: The Grab
infolabels.plot: In order to rescue the infant son of a defecting German scientist, the team is forced to kidnap three infants and transport them cross-country.

items.title: S01E04 - The Great Theft
items.summary: When a mission to bring back information on a new German airplane engine goes awry, Garrison decides to steal the entire engine.

infolabels.title: The Great Theft
infolabels.plot: When a mission to bring back information on a new German airplane engine goes awry, Garrison decides to steal the entire engine.

items.title: S01E05 - Now I Lay Me Down to Die
items.summary: When the team rescues an Allied agent who is under interrogation at a German hospital, not only is Goniff captured but they find out that the agent already spilled top secret information to the Germans.

infolabels.title: Now I Lay Me Down to Die
infolabels.plot: When the team rescues an Allied agent who is under interrogation at a German hospital, not only is Goniff captured but they find out that the agent already spilled top secret information to the Germans.

items.title: S01E06 - The Deadly Masquerade
items.summary: It was hard enough teaching Goniff to masquerade as an international playboy whom he resembles, but then the team has to rescue him from gangsters to whom the playboy owed money.

infolabels.title: The Deadly Masquerade
infolabels.plot: It was hard enough teaching Goniff to masquerade as an international playboy whom he resembles, but then the team has to rescue him from gangsters to whom the playboy owed money.

items.title: S01E07 - the Expendables
items.summary: After several failed missions, team received a new mission from major Richards. Although garrison strongly opposed it, it was ineffective. Garrison and his ministry, who had a lot of worries, reached the joint site. It turned out that their task was to attract the enemy's firepower, so that the rebellious German general could escape smoothly. When team tried to break through the encirclement and prepare to return to Britain, he met major Richards. The German general was caught by the German army, and Richards came for help. team rescued the general again and returned to Britain, winning the trust and appreciation of major Richards.

infolabels.title: the Expendables
infolabels.plot: After several failed missions, team received a new mission from major Richards. Although garrison strongly opposed it, it was ineffective. Garrison and his ministry, who had a lot of worries, reached the joint site. It turned out that their task was to attract the enemy's firepower, so that the rebellious German general could escape smoothly. When team tried to break through the encirclement and prepare to return to Britain, he met major Richards. The German general was caught by the German army, and Richards came for help. team rescued the general again and returned to Britain, winning the trust and appreciation of major Richards.

items.title: S01E08 - 48 Hours to Doomsday
items.summary: The team has only 48 hours to recover important microfilm hidden in a painting in a Dutch museum.

infolabels.title: 48 Hours to Doomsday
infolabels.plot: The team has only 48 hours to recover important microfilm hidden in a painting in a Dutch museum.

items.title: S01E09 - Banker's Hours
items.summary: When another con is recruited from prison to assist the team in robbing a German bank, they soon suspect that he has a plan of his own.

infolabels.title: Banker's Hours
infolabels.plot: When another con is recruited from prison to assist the team in robbing a German bank, they soon suspect that he has a plan of his own.

items.title: S01E10 - Thieves' Holiday
items.summary: In France to get information on German defenses with the help of a double agent, the cons decide to go off on their own and rob a museum.

infolabels.title: Thieves' Holiday
infolabels.plot: In France to get information on German defenses with the help of a double agent, the cons decide to go off on their own and rob a museum.

items.title: S01E11 - 20 Gallons to Kill
items.summary: When the team's plane is shot down over Yugoslavia on the way back from a mission, they decide to help a local group of resistance fighters.

infolabels.title: 20 Gallons to Kill
infolabels.plot: When the team's plane is shot down over Yugoslavia on the way back from a mission, they decide to help a local group of resistance fighters.

items.title: S01E12 - Operation Hellfire
items.summary: In order to better complete the task, garrison asked fleig of the arson investigation team of the Chicago police department to join the operation and assist GG to go to the university town of Windsor in Germany to obtain information. However, due to the police identity of freig, GG was full of hostility and distrust.

infolabels.title: Operation Hellfire
infolabels.plot: In order to better complete the task, garrison asked fleig of the arson investigation team of the Chicago police department to join the operation and assist GG to go to the university town of Windsor in Germany to obtain information. However, due to the police identity of freig, GG was full of hostility and distrust.

items.title: S01E13 - Black Market
items.summary: The team is assigned to infiltrate a gang of Italian black marketeers who are hijacking Allied supply trucks.

infolabels.title: Black Market
infolabels.plot: The team is assigned to infiltrate a gang of Italian black marketeers who are hijacking Allied supply trucks.

items.title: S01E14 - The Great Crime Wave
items.summary: The team stages a crime wave to keep the German authorities busy while Garrison plants explosives to destroy a cache of gold.

infolabels.title: The Great Crime Wave
infolabels.plot: The team stages a crime wave to keep the German authorities busy while Garrison plants explosives to destroy a cache of gold.

items.title: S01E15 - Friendly Enemies
items.summary: The team helps a group of Americans escape from a prison camp in Italy by sowing dissension between the Germans and Italians.

infolabels.title: Friendly Enemies
infolabels.plot: The team helps a group of Americans escape from a prison camp in Italy by sowing dissension between the Germans and Italians.

items.title: S01E16 - Run From Death
items.summary: A French nun convinces the team to transport four orphans and a dog back to England with them.

infolabels.title: Run From Death
infolabels.plot: A French nun convinces the team to transport four orphans and a dog back to England with them.

items.title: S01E17 - The Magnificent Forger
items.summary: The team is sent to replace a list of Nazi collaborators with a list of Allied agents, but they need the assistance of a forger who's too scared to complete the job.

infolabels.title: The Magnificent Forger
infolabels.plot: The team is sent to replace a list of Nazi collaborators with a list of Allied agents, but they need the assistance of a forger who's too scared to complete the job.

items.title: S01E18 - The Death Sentence
items.summary: When Garrison is charged with cowardice and desertion, the team goes into action to find out the truth.

infolabels.title: The Death Sentence
infolabels.plot: When Garrison is charged with cowardice and desertion, the team goes into action to find out the truth.

items.title: S01E19 - War Games
items.summary: While rescuing Allied prisoners behind enemy lines, Garrison finds out from an old friend how to destroy a huge German artillery piece that has been wreaking havoc among the Allied forces.

infolabels.title: War Games
infolabels.plot: While rescuing Allied prisoners behind enemy lines, Garrison finds out from an old friend how to destroy a huge German artillery piece that has been wreaking havoc among the Allied forces.

items.title: S01E20 - The Big Lie
items.summary: The mission is to convince a German officer that a big Allied attack is already in progress, in a location other than where it will really take place.

infolabels.title: The Big Lie
infolabels.plot: The mission is to convince a German officer that a big Allied attack is already in progress, in a location other than where it will really take place.

items.title: S01E21 - Ride of Terror
items.summary: The American colonel that the team is to rescue from a prison camp in France turns out to have been the warden of a hellhole of an American prison where Chief was an inmate.

infolabels.title: Ride of Terror
infolabels.plot: The American colonel that the team is to rescue from a prison camp in France turns out to have been the warden of a hellhole of an American prison where Chief was an inmate.

items.title: S01E22 - War and Crime
items.summary: Garrison's plan to substitute a convict in New York for a lookalike German field marshal goes awry when the convict escapes from prison.

infolabels.title: War and Crime
infolabels.plot: Garrison's plan to substitute a convict in New York for a lookalike German field marshal goes awry when the convict escapes from prison.

items.title: S01E23 - The Plot to Kill
items.summary: The team accompanies Keeler to the meeting of German officers where he is to give the go-ahead on the plot to kill Hitler, but things go awry again when Keeler is killed.

infolabels.title: The Plot to Kill
infolabels.plot: The team accompanies Keeler to the meeting of German officers where he is to give the go-ahead on the plot to kill Hitler, but things go awry again when Keeler is killed.

items.title: S01E24 - The Frame-Up
items.summary: A con woman is temporarily brought in to replace a wounded Chief and pull off a con at a French casino.

infolabels.title: The Frame-Up
infolabels.plot: A con woman is temporarily brought in to replace a wounded Chief and pull off a con at a French casino.

items.title: S01E25 - The War Diamonds
items.summary: The team goes to Switzerland to recover industrial diamonds that were stolen from a German train.

infolabels.title: The War Diamonds
infolabels.plot: The team goes to Switzerland to recover industrial diamonds that were stolen from a German train.

items.title: S01E26 - Time Bomb
items.summary: The team must enter a room with an unexploded bomb in order to crack a safe containing a vital sample of heavy water.

infolabels.title: Time Bomb
infolabels.plot: The team must enter a room with an unexploded bomb in order to crack a safe containing a vital sample of heavy water.
